hypothesis: Incorporating chirality-aware symbolic anchors (CIP-annotated SMILES) and an auxiliary contrastive head aligning 3D electron-density grids to the sign of specific optical rotation will produce embeddings that remain SO(3)-invariant (rotated-instance Accuracy@10 within 5% of the current baseline) while becoming enantioselective (linear-probe AUROC > 0.9 for discriminating enantiomeric pairs).
